Patch Set 26:

Of course lnetctl peer show will fail. At this patch level peer is still the pre-IPv6 version so it will fail to handle that NID. With later patch 49516 you get:

[root@nebula1 17:35:15][tests]# lnetctl peer show
peer:
-     primary nid: fe80::4ed9:8fff:fe85:23c6@tcp
      Multi-Rail: false
      peer ni:
      -     nid: fe80::4ed9:8fff:fe85:23c6@tcp
            state: down
-     primary nid: 172.30.248.61@tcp
      Multi-Rail: true
      peer ni:
      -     nid: 172.30.248.61@tcp
            state: NA
-     primary nid: 10.73.20.2@tcp
      Multi-Rail: false
      peer ni:
      -     nid: 10.73.20.2@tcp
            state: NA

You need the later patches for your test to work.
